bird.name: Guianan schiffornis
bird.summary: The Guianan schiffornis (Schiffornis olivacea), also called the olivaceous schiffornis and olivaceous mourner, is a species of Neotropical…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

locations.name: Sierra de Lema
locations.summary: The Sierra de Lema is an upland mountain range area with tepuis, located in Bolívar state of southeastern Venezuela.

relations.subject: Guianan schiffornis
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits the interior of humid and wet forest; it also is found, though rarely, at the forest edge and in mature secondary forest. It is mostly a bird of the lowlands but has been heard at about in the Sierra de Lema in Bolívar.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L
